title: Less Chorus
description: Drastically reduces the number of Chorus plants that appears in the End, giving it a more desolate feeling
body:
The End, and its islands, is a dry and almost dead dimension.

However, the Chorus seems to proliferate there in an invasive way reducing the feeling of desolation of this dimension.

This data pack simply reduces the number of Chorus plants that appears in the End. Well, simply, drastically rather, since the Chorus plants are 4 times more rare and sparse than by default.

![compars](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/lrQvJTbf/images/26f867f44e5501fe7629c7a6a7cb69149019c8ca.gif)
